zh.lifeSummary: Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan是Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Gam的兒子，於大約1292年出生在英國威爾斯福林爾哈爾金。他於大約1311年與Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig在威爾士福林爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1348年在威爾士福林爾哈爾金享年57歲，埋葬在威爾士福林爾哈爾金。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan是Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Gam的儿子，于大约1292年出生在英国威尔斯福林爾哈爾金。他于大约1311年与Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig在威尔士福林爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1348年在威尔士福林爾哈爾金享年57岁，埋葬在威尔士福林爾哈爾金。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Ithel
meanings: A Welsh name derived from the Greek, signifying 'blooming luxuriantly, flourishing, rich.'. It is from Ithel that we have first the name Ap-Ithel, then by corruption, Bithell and Bethell.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Sais
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Fernando, Orlando, Angelita, Arturo, Delfina, Desiderio, Dionicio, Edgardo, Elva, Fidel, Isidoro, Jere.
Catalan: topographic name from saix ‘rock’ (from Latin saxum), or an ethnic name for a Saxon, derived from the root of saxó ‘Saxon’.

en.lifeSummary: Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan was born about 1292, in Halkyn, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the son of Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Gam. He married Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig about 1311, in Flintshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died in 1348, in Halkyn, Flintshire, Wales, at the age of 57, and was buried in Halkyn, Flintshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan est né environ 1292, à Halkyn, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fils de Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Gam. Il a épousé Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig environ 1311, à Flintshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en 1348, à Halkyn, Flintshire, Galles, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Halkyn, Flintshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan wurde um 1292 in Halkyn, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Gam geboren. Er hat um 1311 in Flintshire, Wales Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb 1348 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Halkyn, Flintshire, Wales und wurde in Halkyn, Flintshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan è nato il circa 1292 nel Halkyn, Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito come figlio di Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Gam. Lui sposato Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig circa 1311, nel Flintshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1348, nel Halkyn, Flintshire, Galles, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Halkyn, Flintshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychanは約1292年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアハルクインでIthel Fychan ap Ithel Gamの息子として生まれた。約1311年にウェールズフリントシュアイアでMrs. Margery Ap Cynwrigと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1348年にウェールズフリントシュアイアハルクインで57歳で死去し，ウェールズフリントシュアイアハルクインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan(은)는 대략 1292년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르 할키에서 Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Gam의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1311년 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1348년 웨일스 플린츠히르 할키에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 플린츠히르 할키에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan nasceu aproximadamente 1292, em Halkyn, Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom filho de Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Gam. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig aproximadamente 1311, em Flintshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1348, em Halkyn, Flintshire, Gales, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Halkyn, Flintshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan родился около 1292 г. в местности хэлкин, флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Его отца звали Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Gam. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig около 1311 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер в 1348 г. в местности хэлкин, флинцхир, Уэльс в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности хэлкин, флинцхир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cynwrig Sais ap Ithel Fychan nació aproximadamente 1292, en Halkyn, Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido como hijo de Ithel Fychan ap Ithel Gam. Se casó con Mrs. Margery Ap Cynwrig aproximadamente 1311, en Flintshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1348, en Halkyn, Flintshire, Gales, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Halkyn, Flintshire, Gales.
